description: You are the Development Coordinator at the Metro Arts Council. Prepare mailing labels for the 'Golden Circle' gala invitations using Apache OpenOffice Writer and the donor list at '/home/ga/Documents/donor_data.csv'. Create the labels using the 'Avery Letter Size' brand, '5160' type, including only donors with a 'TotalDonation' of $1,000 or more. Each label must show the donor's First Name, Last Name, Address, City, State, and Zip. Save the final merged document with visible recipient information to '/home/ga/Documents/golden_circle_labels.odt'.
